title: Specklinia elegantula
taxonomy: Specklinia elegantula is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This species is a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae. It belongs to the tribe Maxillarieae and is further grouped within the subtribe Maxillariinae. The genus Specklinia is a part of the subfamily Epidendroideae and the family Orchidaceae. This classification is based on the taxonomic studies and characteristics of the plant.
